details.reasoning: Excellent implementation with nearly all requirements met. CLI variant/subcommand correctly added (Stats(StatsArgs) with human bool flag), command implementation properly structured returning ExitStatus::Success, --human flag functional with human_readable_bytes, output includes per-bucket lines and total, module registration complete, and dispatch wiring correctly placed. Tests are comprehensive covering empty cache, human/raw output, and populated cache scenarios. Helper method display_name() added to CacheBucket. One minor deviation: the implementation hardcodes the bucket array instead of using CacheBucket::iter() as specified in rubric, though functionally equivalent. Code follows existing patterns consistently.
